honest.title: Your numbers are real now.
honest.sub: You did the logging — Whenbee knows how your days actually run. Now let Pro put those real numbers to work everywhere you plan.

makeDayHonest.title: Your real day, before you live it.
makeDayHonest.sub: You did the logging — Whenbee knows how your days actually run. Pro carries those real numbers into everything you plan.

calendarExport.title: Your real day, before you live it.
calendarExport.sub: You did the logging — Whenbee knows how your days actually run. Pro carries those real numbers into everything you plan.

dayCapacity.title: Know what the day can hold.
dayCapacity.sub: Before you say yes to one more thing, see whether it actually fits your real hours.

goals.title: You set the aim. Now get a coach.
goals.sub: Pick an accuracy goal for any category. Whenbee coaches you at guess-time and shows your ETA to hitting it.

routines.title: Set it once. It remembers the honest length.
routines.sub: Your morning routine takes 50 minutes, not 20. Pro learns the whole chain and tells you when to actually start.

stealsYourTime.title: See exactly what steals your time.
stealsYourTime.sub: Your logs already hold the pattern — when you slip, what context costs you, and the hours you're sharpest. Pro reads it back.

focusWindow.title: Plan around your sharpest hours.
focusWindow.sub: Whenbee learns when your estimates land tight and when they slip — so you can put the hard work where it fits.

honestRange.title: How sure is that number?
honestRange.sub: Pro shows the confidence band around your honest estimate — and watches it narrow as you calibrate.

reviewRitual.title: See exactly what steals your time.
reviewRitual.sub: Your logs already hold the pattern — when you slip, what context costs you, and the hours you're sharpest. Pro reads it back.

pdfExport.title: Hand someone your honest numbers.
pdfExport.sub: A clean weekly or monthly report — made on your phone, shared only when you choose.

hyperfocusGuard.title: Whenbee stays with you while you work.
hyperfocusGuard.sub: Your live timer and honest finish-time on the lock screen, plus a gentle nudge when you've run well past your guess.

persistentPresence.title: Whenbee stays with you while you work.
persistentPresence.sub: Your live timer and honest finish-time on the lock screen, plus a gentle nudge when you've run well past your guess.

settingsUpgrade.title: Everything your honest numbers can do.
settingsUpgrade.sub: You did the logging. Pro puts those real numbers to work everywhere you plan.

proReveal.title: Everything your honest numbers can do.
proReveal.sub: You did the logging. Pro puts those real numbers to work everywhere you plan.

proPreview.title: Everything your honest numbers can do.
proPreview.sub: You did the logging. Pro puts those real numbers to work everywhere you plan.

calendar.title: Honest calendar & capacity
calendar.desc: Every event padded with your real buffers. See what the day can actually hold — and plan around your sharpest hours.

coach.title: Routines & goal coach
coach.desc: Recurring chains learn their honest length. Set an accuracy aim per category and get help at guess-time, with an ETA to your goal.

insight.title: Sharper self-insight
insight.desc: What steals your time, when you're most accurate, and what context costs you — the patterns your logs already hold.

review.title: Your week, reviewed
review.desc: A calm weekly & monthly recap, long-range history, and a clean PDF or one-tap share — made on your phone, never sent without you.

presence.title: Always there
presence.desc: Live timer and finish-time on your lock screen, plus a gentle nudge when you've run well past your guess.

topProof.coachCaption: On track — about 2 weeks to your goal.
topProof.insightCaption: Mornings land tight. Late afternoons slip.

founderReserve.headline: Lock the founder price — {{price}}
founderReserve.sub: Set it aside now. Nothing is charged until your numbers turn honest, and then Pro is yours at this price.

plans.unavailable: Plans are not available right now. Check your connection and reopen this screen.
plans.purchaseError: That didn't go through. No charge was made — give it another try.
plans.restoreNone: No earlier purchase found on this Apple ID.
plans.restoreError: Couldn't reach the store. Try again in a moment.
plans.finePrint: No charge today. We will remind you before the trial ends. Cancel anytime. On-device and private.
plans.freeStripRest: No card, no renewal — that is your real trial. Pro just adds the payoff.
plans.trustLine: Built by people who are late to everything. It is the tool we needed first.
plans.expoGoNotice: Running in Expo Go — purchases are simulated.
